vectors.name: truncated-u64-argument
vectors.why: major-0 says eight argument bytes, only two are present

vectors.name: trailing-byte
vectors.why: one complete int followed by extra data

vectors.name: invalid-utf8
vectors.why: text string payload is not UTF-8

vectors.name: reserved-additional-info-28
vectors.why: additional-info 28 is reserved by CBOR and outside taut's subset

vectors.name: unsupported-major-tag
vectors.why: CBOR tags are outside taut's frozen subset

vectors.name: non-integer-map-key
vectors.why: raw CBOR maps must use integer field-tag keys

vectors.name: duplicate-map-key
vectors.why: same raw CBOR map key appears twice

vectors.name: positive-int-overflow
vectors.why: CBOR major-0 value is just above i64::MAX

vectors.name: negative-int-overflow
vectors.why: CBOR major-1 value is just below i64::MIN

vectors.name: unknown-enum
vectors.why: Mode has no member with wire value 99

vectors.name: non-canonical-int-2byte
vectors.why: value 5 in a 2-byte argument (0x19 0x0005); canonical is the immediate 0x05 (width 25)

vectors.name: non-canonical-int-8byte
vectors.why: value 5 in an 8-byte argument; canonical is the immediate 0x05 (width 27)

vectors.name: negative-map-key
vectors.why: raw CBOR map key -1 (major-1); the canonical encoder only emits non-negative field tags

vectors.name: nested-truncated-string
vectors.why: text string nested inside a map claims 3 bytes but only 2 are present
